modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer beeping and flashing red, will not turn on.

full_description_text: User reports that the desktop computer is not turning on. It is making beeping sounds and a red light is flashing. This issue occurs when trying to power on the HP desktop running Microsoft Windows. The user is unable to boot the system.
short_description: Computer beeping and flashing red, will not turn on.
description: User reports that the desktop computer is not turning on. It is making beeping sounds and a red light is flashing. This issue occurs when trying to power on the HP desktop running Microsoft Windows. The user is unable to boot the system.
